hero.title: Aleven
bulletPoints: Custom animated illustrations tailored to your idea or brand.
Typography animations that bring words to life.
Seamless looping animations ideal for social media, ads, websites, or presentations.
High-resolution GIFs and video exports optimized for all platforms.
Whether you want something playful, artistic, or sleek and professional, I can design GIF animations that stand out, engage, and tell your story in motion.

about.title: Please Call Me aleven
about.subtitle: — Motion Designer —
about.mainText:
At Aleven , 
creativity moves with purpose.

I transform concepts into dynamic visual stories, blending innovation with refined design to create animations that inspire, engage, and leave a lasting impression. Every frame is crafted with intention-turning imagination into impactful digital experiences.
about.description: Specializing in seamless looping animations, high-resolution GIFs, and platform-optimized video exports — I design motion that captures attention and tells stories visually.
about.quote: " Driven by a passion for bold visuals and creative motion, every piece I create goes beyond animation."
about.bottomText: I love pushing the limits of visual storytelling.

play.text: A creative playground for experimental visuals, animations, and interactive ideas.
